__comment: MCP server config for Cursor. Each entry under mcpServers is an MCP server the agent can invoke. Trust posture: treat every server as a dependency — review source, pin versions, re-review on every change. See kit/.cursor/rules/40-security.mdc for the full MCP-trust rule. All MCP calls are audit-logged by the beforeMCPExecution hook.
__trust_checklist: 1. Review the server's source code or documentation before enabling.
2. Pin to a specific version or commit hash — never use 'latest'.
3. Re-review this file on every change (CVE-2025-54136).
4. Check .cursor/hooks-audit.log periodically for unexpected MCP calls.
5. Remove servers you no longer use.

__example_DO_NOT_ENABLE.description: Example entry showing the schema. Rename this key to a real server name under mcpServers to enable.
